title: Senior Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Hindustan Unilever
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
